title: Omalotheca afghanica
taxonomy: Omalotheca afghanica is classified within the family Asteraceae, commonly known as the sunflower or daisy family. This family is a large and diverse group of flowering plants, and Omalotheca afghanica is one of its members. The genus Omalotheca is further classified under the tribe Gnaphalieae, which includes many species of daisy-like plants. The species Omalotheca afghanica is native to Afghanistan and is a type of shrub or low-growing perennial plant. It is a relatively rare and less well-known species within the Asteraceae family.
